name: Ribbed Tray Tan - Room Essentials™
description:
Create an organized, artistic bath space by adding the Ribbed Tray from Room Essentials™. This tan tray features an allover ribbed design for a classic look that complements your existing decor well. Made of plastic with an open top, this rectangle tray offers ample space for cosmetics and other items. Simply hand wash it for easy maintenance. You can use it alone or add a coordinating ribbed soap pump to complete the look.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
